post_run_audit_corrections: Label-only correction: Origin A P2 statistically_weak changed from true to false because the point estimate is a degradation, not a weak improvement. No numeric result or verdict changed.

Future-run guard strengthened to verify PMF expected-saves mean matching directly; independent artifact recomputation found maximum single-vs-mixture gaps of 0.00121 saves (A) and 0.000086 saves (B), consistent with cap truncation. No rerun performed.

design.offset_formula: A=opp_off_all_corsi_ema5*team_def_all_corsi_against_ema5/prior_league_corsi; F=A*opp_unblocked_frac*team_unblocked_frac/prior_league_unblocked_frac; c=prior_league_sog/prior_league_fenwick; r_opp=(opp_shots_rolling_10/opp_off_all_fenwick_ema5)/c; r_team=(team_shots_against_rolling_10/team_def_all_fenwick_against_ema5)/c; lambda0_60=F*c*sqrt(clip(r_opp,0.5,2.0)*clip(r_team,0.5,2.0)); non-finite lambda0_60 uses fixed 30.0 SOG/60 fallback
design.primary_alpha: one validation-residual alpha per origin, composed with actual validation TOI, shared by single and mixture
design.sensitivity_alpha: one train-residual alpha per origin, composed with actual train TOI, shared by single and mixture
design.test_toi_use: postgame diagnostics only; forbidden from all predictions
design.network_policy: local parquet/model reads only; no network client imported or called

overall_verdict.consequence: Failure: purchases remain blocked; move queue per section 12.7.
